hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "git commit"; then bash ./scripts/workflow-gate.sh pre-commit; fi'

allow: Bash(python -m pytest tests/unit/test_event_handlers.py tests/unit/test_event_consumer.py tests/unit/test_event_gating.py tests/unit/test_event_dispatcher.py -v --tb=short)
